title: Mongoose Querying Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on complex queries and population in Mongoose.

questions.question: Which method is used to find a document by its '_id' field directly?
What process is used to replace object IDs with actual documents from other collections?
How do you specify a reverse chronological sort by 'createdAt' in a Mongoose query?
Which methods are used for pagination in Mongoose?
Mongoose methods like 'find()' return which type of object that allows method chaining?
